requirement_topic.en: Safety and Timor-Leste Environmental Suitability — IEC 62109, ANE/EDTL Conformity, Heat and Humidity Derating
requirement_topic.zh: 安全与东帝汶环境适用性——IEC 62109、ANE/EDTL合规、热与湿度降额
requirement_topic.zht: 安全與東帝汶環境適用性——IEC 62109、ANE/EDTL合規、熱與濕度降額

summary.en: Timor-Leste PV inverter documentation should follow domestic ANE/EDTL conformity expectations and IEC-aligned safety evidence. IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are key for inverter safety and utility-interface behavior. Timor-Leste projects should additionally demonstrate climate suitability, including high-ambient operation limits, enclosure design for tropical conditions, thermal derating, and ventilation or cooling strategies.
summary.zh: 东帝汶光伏逆变器文件应遵循国内ANE/EDTL合规要求及IEC对齐安全证据。IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是逆变器安全与电网接口行为的核心标准。东帝汶项目还应证明环境适应性，包括高温运行范围、热湿气候下的外壳设计、热降额以及通风或散热策略。
summary.zht: 東帝汶光伏逆變器文件應遵循國內ANE/EDTL合規要求及IEC對齊安全證據。IEC 62109-1與IEC 62109-2是逆變器安全與電網介面行為的核心標準。東帝汶項目還應證明環境適應性，包括高溫運行範圍、熱濕氣候下的外殼設計、熱降額以及通風或散熱策略。

standards_or_laws: ANE/EDTL conformity route for regulated project-connected equipment
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2
Project-level environmental assumptions: heat and humidity derating, enclosure and ventilation

summary.en: Chinese documentation commonly uses GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024, which are useful for baseline technical quality. For Timor-Leste readiness, these documents need explicit mapping to IEC 62109 clauses and local climate assumptions, especially for thermal rise and humidity control.
summary.zh: 中国通常基于GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024形成技术文件，这些文件有助于基础质量。用于东帝汶时，需要将文件明确映射到IEC 62109条款与当地气候假设，尤其是温升和湿度控制。
summary.zht: 中國通常基於GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024形成技術文件，這些文件有助於基礎質量。用於東帝汶時，需要將文件明確映射到IEC 62109條款與當地氣候假設，尤其是溫升和濕度控制。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定

gap.en: Gap: Chinese reports remain useful, but Timor-Leste projects require IEC 62109 mapping, heat/humidity derating curves for local deployment, and explicit documentation of moisture ingress and maintenance access. Add project-specific commissioning assumptions before export readiness decisions.
gap.zh: 差距：中国报告仍具参考价值，但东帝汶项目需要IEC 62109映射、适应本地高温高湿部署的热湿度降额曲线，以及湿度侵入和维护通道说明。出货决策前应补充项目化调试假设。
gap.zht: 差距：中國報告仍有參考價值，但東帝汶項目需要IEC 62109映射、高溫高濕部署的熱濕度降額曲線，以及濕氣侵入和維修通道說明。出貨決策前應補充專案化調試假設。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific and commonly required where ANE/EDTL or project specifications call for IEC 62109 and environmental suitability evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese documentation is preparatory; project-specific IEC mapping remains required

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2-aligned evidence with local climate assumptions for Timor-Leste projects; do not rely on Chinese reports alone. Include moisture ingress control, thermal derating, and commissioning assumptions in technical dossiers.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 东帝汶项目应按IEC 62109-1/-2并结合当地气候假设准备证据，不可仅依赖中国报告。技术档案应包含湿气防护、热降额和调试假设。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 東帝汶項目應按IEC 62109-1/-2並結合當地氣候假設準備證據，不可僅依賴中國報告。技術文件應包含潮氣防護、熱降額和調試假設。
